global_good_recommendations: Try reproducing with debug mode enabled.
Try reproducing while moving into new terrain.
Try reproducing with resource packs disabled.
Try reproducing after updating the renderer mod.
Compare a report with and without recently added optimization mods.
Attach Markdown and JSON reports to GitHub.
Back up the world before changing chunk-recovery settings.

GARBAGE_COLLECTION: Reduce allocation rate (fewer entities, particles, chunk updates).
Add FerriteCore or Memory Leak Fix.
Attach the JSON report with GC log if available.
MEMORY_PRESSURE: Reduce render distance and entity counts.
Reproduce and export report with heap info.
SERVER_TICK_SPIKE: Use spark profiler to identify the ticking hotspot.
Reduce entity counts in affected areas.
Attach the JSON report and spark profile.
CLIENT_RENDER_STUTTER: Test with Entity Culling and More Culling.
CHUNK_GENERATION: Compare with and without heavy worldgen datapacks.
CHUNK_LOADING: Add a chunk loading optimization mod.
RESOURCE_RELOAD: Expected during resource pack reload. No action needed unless severe.
Update resource packs if reload is slow.
Consider ImmediatelyFast to speed up reload.
WORLD_SAVE: Enable async chunk saving if available.
Reduce world save frequency if configurable.
PLAYER_JOIN: Use Krypton/Pluto to reduce join overhead.
Check server TPS around join events.
BACKGROUND_THROTTLING: This is probably intentional background throttling, not a gameplay stutter.
No action needed unless FPS is low after refocusing.
UNKNOWN_FREEZE: Enable debug mode and reproduce the freeze.
Export report and compare with a run without recently added mods.
Submit the report via /sa submit last.
Attach Markdown and JSON files to GitHub.
PERIODIC_MINOR_MICRO_HITCH: Usually harmless. No action required unless it becomes frequent or noticeable.
Check for background polling tasks, mod overlays, and skin/cape checks.
Check for scheduled mod timers firing at regular intervals.
Do not adjust GPU, render distance, or server settings for this category.
UNCLASSIFIED_MICRO_HITCH: Usually harmless for a one-off minor hitch.
Monitor for recurrence. If it becomes frequent, enable debug mode.
Do not adjust GPU or render settings for a single minor hitch.
UNCLASSIFIED_FRAME_HITCH: Enable debug mode if this recurs frequently.
Check GPU usage and server MSPT around the time of the hitch.
Compare a report with and without recently added mods.
